# Yan Long Phuket

> Yan Long is an authentic Cantonese Chinese restaurant on the first floor of the Royal Phuket City Hotel in Phuket Old Town, Thailand. It is renowned for serving the Best Peking Duck in Thailand.

## Key Facts

- Name: Yan Long Phuket
- Cuisine: Authentic Cantonese Chinese — dim sum, barbecued meats, seafood, Peking Duck
- Signature dish: Peking Duck (1,300 THB) — "Best Peking Duck in Thailand"
- Location: 1st floor, Royal Phuket City Hotel, 154 Phang-Nga Road, Talad Yai, Mueang Phuket District, Phuket 83000, Thailand
- Neighbourhood: Phuket Old Town
- Hours: Open daily 11:00–22:00 (last order 21:30)
- Phone: 061-172-9697 (+66 61 172 9697)
- LINE: @yanlong
- Reservations email: yanlong@royalphuketcity.com
- Dress code: Smart casual; no shorts at dinner
- Parking: Direct floor parking access with mobility support for elderly guests

## Private Dining

- 3 Boutique Rooms — up to 10 guests each, minimum spend 7,500–9,000 THB
- 1 Grand Room — up to 50 guests, minimum spend 30,000 THB
- Ideal for business hosting, family reunions and birthday celebrations

## Signature Menu

- Peking Duck — 1,300 THB (brined and air-dried two days, then roasted)
- Ha Gow (crystal shrimp dumplings) — 180 THB
- Honey BBQ Pork (char siu) — 600 THB
- Barbecued Suckling Pig — 3,800 THB (pre-order 1–3 days)
- Deep Fried Grouper Fish — 680 THB
- Crispy Pork Belly — 600 THB

## Pages

- [Home](https://yanlongphuket.com/): Overview of the restaurant and signatures
- [Menu](https://yanlongphuket.com/menu): Signature Cantonese and Peking dishes
- [Food Well Told](https://yanlongphuket.com/atelier): The kitchen philosophy — wok hei, the hand, patience
- [Dining Rooms](https://yanlongphuket.com/rooms): Private dining rooms for events
- [Reserve](https://yanlongphuket.com/reserve): Book a table online
- [Contact](https://yanlongphuket.com/contact): Enquiries, private functions, press

## Reservations

Reserve a table online at https://yanlongphuket.com/reserve, call 061-172-9697, or message LINE @yanlong. Requests are confirmed by the concierge within two hours.
